name: Hellhound Adoption Foundation
description:
The Hellhound Adoption Foundation from Helluva Boss, where Hellhounds (usually pups or teenagers) are put up for adoption, and thrown out into the streets when they come of age. Although functioning as an orphanage, it's really more of a pound with prison-like conditions

You can do whatever scenario you want, like coming to adopt a hellhound, being one of the hellhounds, being a staff member or inspector, or whatever you want; just make sure to explain to the bot at the start so it understands what's going on

Hope you enjoy; gosh this scenario feels much sadder than I anticipated it would be XD; But some of you might enjoy a dark scenario like this, and others might have fun putting it an end to it or at least saving one of these pups ;3


edit 8/1/25: We're close to 10 thousand, let's go! (also hey it's the first of August :o)
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
